fact: Tom Peterson III, in a feature interview published August 28, 2024 by The Advance News, stated: 'The concept of a realtor being involved was a new idea in rural South Georgia, even though it was rather common in bigger areas like Savannah and Atlanta. Around here, people just stuck up a for sale sign and when someone that needed a house noticed it, they then contacted a lawyer to prepare a sales contract and proceeded to closing.' He founded Tom Peterson Realtors, Inc. in 1979 after leaving his cousin Lawson Peterson's realty company.

Carolyn Robinson, G.R.I, Appraiser (phone: 912-537-2363, carolyn@tprealtors.com) is listed as an active agent at Tom Peterson, Inc. Realtors, 110 Jackson Street, Vidalia, Georgia, as confirmed in the firm's paid print advertisement in The Advance (Vidalia, GA) dated February 11, 2026 — the most recent issue in the Georgia Historic Newspapers archive.

Tom Peterson III has been involved in various boards and organizations within the community, such as the Vidalia City Council and Toombs County Chamber of Commerce (now Greater Vidalia Chamber). His team of realtors never failed to attend community events and fundraisers, such as the Meadows Hospital Health Fair 3 Mile Fun Walk. (Source: The Advance News feature, August 28, 2024, https://www.theadvancenews.com/2024/08/28/chatwith-tom-peterson-iii/)
